title: Golem Overhaul
description: Golem Overhaul adds 9 new golem types, all with their own unique mechanics!
body:
Golem Overhaul adds 9 new golem types, all with their own unique mechanics! All golem stats can be found under images.



Josh/Joosh - Art
AlexNijjar - Programming
scratchy_sd - Sound effects
ArkticBoi - Concept art


[**Creatures and Beasts**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creatures-and-beasts) A mod that adds amazing creatures into Minecraft!
[**Critters and Companions**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions) A mod which adds a variety of friendly animals!
[**Creeper Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul) A mod which overhauls the vanilla creepers!
[**Enderman Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul) A mod which overhauls the vanilla endermen!
[**Ghost**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ghost) A mod which adds two friendly ghost mobs to your world!
[**Nightlights**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/nightlights) A mod that adds a variety of new light sources to Minecraft!
[**Lookin' sharp**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/lookin-sharp) Adding 60 new melee weapons to the game!
[**Ribbits**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ribbits) Ribbits adds new swamp villages, full of frog villagers!
